title: Entry Write Control System (MICU) Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: Entry Write Control System (MICU) Input Inspection
1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an abnormality in the system Replace the fuse box Each coupler is all female terminal cord side 3. Reconnect each coupler in the fuse box 4. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace the fuse box

refs.label: Reconnect each coupler in the fuse box

rows.text: *1: Vehicles equipped with TRW SRS unit *2: Vehicles equipped with DENSO SRS unit
Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G202) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G403) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Driver Door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Assisted door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
R. Rear door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G503) Tailgate latch switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
L. Rear door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Driver Door lock knob switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
*1: Vehicles equipped with TRW SRS unit *2: Vehicles equipped with DENSO SRS unit
Map light DOOR position, shorting the inspection terminal to body ground.
out of valves Map Light Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Cargo area Light DOOR position, shorting inspection terminals to body ground.
Cargo area light must be on
out of valves Cargo Area Light Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
